purpose: non-determinism falsification baseline (deliberately uses float atomicAdd)

hardware_profile.compute_library: CuPy 14.0.1 (custom CUDA C kernels via RawKernel)

workload_specification.atomic_discipline: FLOAT atomicAdd (intentional violation of PCIP-0010 proposed §6.4.1)
workload_specification.violated_design_rule: uses atomicAdd on float32 cell_mass, cell_com, quadrupole tensor

canonical_outputs.note: This experiment is the canonical falsification baseline. Three runs with the same seed MUST produce three distinct envelope hashes when float atomicAdd is used.

determinism_stress.note: Distinct hashes are the expected outcome. Exact values vary per run due to non-deterministic warp scheduling.

scientific_value: Establishes empirical necessity of integer atomic discipline. See DETERMINISM-RULE.md for derived PCIP-0010 §6.4.1 amendment.
